# Product Hunt Launch Copy

> Use this copy when creating your Product Hunt launch at producthunt.com/posts/new

---

## Product Name

CrewForm

## Tagline (60 chars max)

Open-source AI agent orchestration — form your AI crew ⚡

## Description

CrewForm is an open-source platform for building, managing, and orchestrating AI agent teams — all through a visual web interface.

**No Python. No notebooks. No CLI.** Just create agents, give them tasks, and watch them work in real-time.

### What makes it different:

🔑 **BYOK** — Bring your own API keys. Zero LLM cost markup — you pay your provider directly.

🔀 **3 Team Modes** — Pipeline (sequential chain), Orchestrator (brain delegates to workers), and Collaboration (agents discuss and debate).

🏪 **Marketplace** — Browse and install agent templates built by the community, or publish your own.

🏠 **Self-Hostable** — One command: `docker compose up -d`. Your data stays on your infra.

⚡ **14 LLM Providers** — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Mistral, Cohere, and 8 more.

🔗 **Integrations** — Zapier (7,000+ apps), Discord, Slack, Telegram, Email, webhooks, Trello, Asana.

### Built with:
React, TypeScript, Supabase, Node.js, pgvector, Docker

### Pricing:
Free tier (3 agents, 50 tasks/mo) → Pro $39/mo → Team $99/mo → Enterprise custom

---

## Maker Comment

Hey Product Hunt! 👋

I'm Vince, the founder of CrewForm. I built this because I wanted a way to manage AI agent teams without writing Python scripts every time.

The core idea: **assign work to AI agents the same way you'd assign work to a team member** — through a UI, with real-time visibility into what they're doing.

A few things I'm particularly proud of:

1. **The 3 team modes** — Pipeline chains agents sequentially (like an assembly line). Orchestrator has a "brain" agent that delegates to specialists. Collaboration lets agents discuss a topic together.

2. **BYOK** — Your API keys, encrypted with AES-256-GCM. We never touch your LLM spend.

3. **Self-hosting** — `docker compose up -d` and you're running CrewForm on your own server. All 55+ database migrations run automatically.

We're AGPL-3.0 open source — the codebase is fully transparent.

Would love your feedback on what features to prioritize next. Happy to answer any questions! 🚀
